___________________________________________________________

Okay, so this bot was inspired by Hushtag because they made a 1x1x1x1 bot minion version and it kinda made me happy that minor characters like that could be recognized. Also, Spamton angel exists no where else, so I M U S T bring him life! Please enjoy the silly, I made him just so you can squish the skrunkly :3
